steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The A320 is described as “streamlined”; the next sentence introduces a “boxy semitruck.” This direct opposition demands a contrast transition word to explicitly mark the shift from one example to its opposite.

steps.title: Match the transition
steps.content: ”On the other hand” marks exactly this kind of opposition—here's one side, but look at the other side. The others either continue the same direction (Specifically), suggest causation (As a result), or conclude the thought (In conclusion). That matches choice B — B is correct.
